originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__a_1885` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&a` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(or (and __STRICT_ANSI__ (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF))
    (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME))
    (and (and __STRICT_ANSI__ ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP))
    (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF))
    (and (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME))
    (and (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__) ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF)
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         (not ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  false)
reasoning: b62bd7b261b.c L14: 'char *a = val;' is a dead store when ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP is not set, because 'a' is only used at L21 inside #ifdef MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP. The variable 'a' is declared inside #ifdef MDEV_CONF / #ifdef MDEV_RENAME, so if either of those is false the variable does not exist (no dead store). The PC covers !MDEV_CONF and !MDEV_RENAME cases (which are desugaring artifacts where 'a' is not in scope). The STRICT_ANSI terms cancel out (both T and F versions present). Real condition for dead store: MDEV_CONF AND MDEV_RENAME AND !MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP. PC includes cases where MDEV_CONF=F or MDEV_RENAME=F — under-constrained. No restrictive library macros remain after cancellation. New bug.
